summary: Sprint 4 frontend testing complete. Dual-pane layout, visualizer cards, mobile drawer, animations and all prior features verified at 1440px (desktop) and 390px (mobile).

issues: Footer text wraps to two lines on 390px - 'System: v1.8 | Deep Tech & DevTools' and 'LinkedIn: /in/anushkakarmakar' stack. Minor display concern but readable.

action_items: Upload /public/olly.png and /public/dogs.png when ready — placeholder boxes currently show correctly as expected per Sprint 4 spec.

Consider giving VisualizerCard in the mobile drawer a distinct data-testid (e.g., 'visualizer-card-mobile-{id}') to avoid duplicate testid in the DOM when both desktop pane and mobile drawer are rendered simultaneously.
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate data-testid: Both the desktop VisualizerCard and the mobile drawer VisualizerCard share data-testid='visualizer-card-{id}'. The mobile drawer is CSS-hidden (lg:hidden) on desktop but still rendered in DOM, causing two elements with the same testid. This is minor but makes automated selector uniqueness fail. Use key='mobile-{id}' already set but testid should also differ.

VisualizerCard renders in both DOM branches simultaneously when activeCard is set on desktop viewport — desktop card in right pane (visible) and mobile drawer card (hidden). No functional issue but worth noting for future testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 4 fully passing. All dual-pane layout, visualizer cards (whoami/log/status), image placeholders (olly.png/dogs.png), mobile drawer, drawerSlideUp/fadeSlideUp animations, clear reset, typed commands, boot sequence, hot chips, footer all verified. Only pending: actual image files upload.
